heading: Yallunda Flat vs Yamba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yallunda Flat, South Australia and Yamba, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yallunda Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Yamba (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yallunda Flat or Yamba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yallunda Flat has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Yamba scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yallunda Flat scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Yamba scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yallunda Flat or Yamba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yallunda Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
